body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Add a new field `prev_checkpoint_t` in the CoupledSimulation. Update this to keep track of the most recently saved checkpoint.

This is tested by the restart test since it saves multiple checkpoints throughout the simulation. Intermediate checkpoints are deleted, and the last checkpoint isn't deleted so we can still restart.

closes #1396

## Content
- [x] store `prev_checkpoint_t` in the CoupledSimulation
- [x] update `prev_checkpoint_t` when new checkpoints are saved
- [x] after saving a checkpoint, delete the previous one


<!---

- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: delete previous checkpoint when saving a new one
